main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'fouling stage 2 Fe/Mn oxides + incomplete ripening greensand' literal — captura una de 3.

recommended_action.justification: Emergency backwash greensand + ripening with elevated KMnO4 + online cleaning stage 2 low-pH 0.2% citric — operacional + cítrico solo (gold expects secuencial).

requested_data.justification: Pide Fe en reject stream stage 2 — discriminador parcial.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: Fe reject <0.5 y Fe feed >0.15 post-ripening → switch.
